title: Access Performance Advisor with the MongoDB MCP Server

sections.heading: About the MongoDB MCP Server
sections.body:
The MongoDB MCP Server is a tool that allows you to interact with your MongoDB clusters in
natural language by integrating with AI clients like Claude, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot.

To learn more about the MongoDB MCP Server, see [MongoDB MCP Server](mcp-server).

sections.heading: Get Started
sections.body:
To quickly configure the MongoDB MCP Server for your AI client,
complete the steps in [Get Started with the MongoDB MCP Server](mcp-server/get-started).

To learn more about the performance advisor MCP tool, see [Performance Advisor Tool](mcp-server/tools).

For detailed examples with sample outputs, see [Performance Optimization](mcp-server/examples).

sections.heading: Considerations
sections.body:
When performing slow query analysis, the MCP Server retrieves a
sample of slow queries, capped at 50 queries. The sample includes up to 50
most recent slow queries that match any specified conditions in your prompt
to ensure optimal performance and response times.

This limitation does not apply to the Performance Advisor UI in Atlas.

sections.heading: Example Prompts
sections.body:
After you've configured the MongoDB MCP Server and connected it to your Atlas
cluster, you can use natural language to retrieve Performance Advisor recommendations.
The following table illustrates example prompts that you can use:

| Use Case             | Example Prompts                                                                                                                                         | Performance Advisor Operation         |
| -------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- |
| Analyze Slow Queries | Show me my slow queriesWhat is slowing down my cluster?Show me queries that are longer than 5 secondsShow me slow writes in the website.users namespace | slowQueryLogs                         |
| Index Suggestions    | Are there any indexes I should create to improve performance?What indexes do you recommend I drop?                                                      | suggestedIndexes dropIndexSuggestions |
| Schema Advice        | Show schema recommendations for my clusterHelp me optimize my database schema                                                                           | schemaAdvice                          |
